from dataclasses import dataclass

@dataclass
class Triple:
    subject: str
    predicate: str
    object: str

# EVOLVE-BLOCK-START

def predict(triples: list[Triple]) -> str:
    """Convert a list of triples about an athlete (or related entities) into a fluent sentence."""
    if not triples:
        return ""

    # Helper to clean subject strings for natural possessive forms.
    def clean_subject(name: str) -> str:
        # Remove commas and surrounding whitespace, and strip surrounding parentheses.
        cleaned = name.replace(",", "")
        # Remove any trailing periods after Jr or Sr for smoother possessive handling.
        cleaned = cleaned.replace(" Jr.", " Jr").replace(" Sr.", " Sr")
        # Strip leading/trailing whitespace.
        return cleaned.strip()

    # Mapping from predicate to a lambda that builds a phrase.
    # The lambda receives (subject, object) and returns a string.
    templates = {
        "birthDate": lambda s, o: f"{clean_subject(s)} was born on {o}",
        "birthYear": lambda s, o: f"{clean_subject(s)} was born in {o}",
        "birthPlace": lambda s, o: f"{clean_subject(s)} was born in {o}",
        "height": lambda s, o: f"{clean_subject(s)}'s height is {o} meters",
        "weight": lambda s, o: f"{clean_subject(s)}'s weight is {o}",
        "position": lambda s, o: f"{clean_subject(s)} plays as a {o}",
        "club": lambda s, o: f"{clean_subject(s)} plays for {o}",
        "currentclub": lambda s, o: f"{clean_subject(s)} currently plays for {o}",
        "formerTeam": lambda s, o: f"{clean_subject(s)} formerly played for {o}",
        "league": lambda s, o: f"{clean_subject(s)} competes in the {o}",
        "manager": lambda s, o: f"{o} is the manager of {clean_subject(s)}",
        "coach": lambda s, o: f"{clean_subject(s)} is coached by {o}",
        "draftYear": lambda s, o: f"{clean_subject(s)} was drafted in {o}",
        "draftRound": lambda s, o: f"{clean_subject(s)} was selected in round {o}",
        "draftPick": lambda s, o: f"{clean_subject(s)} was pick number {o.strip('\"')}",
        "playerNumber": lambda s, o: f"{clean_subject(s)} wears number {o}",
        "currentteam": lambda s, o: f"{clean_subject(s)} currently plays for {o}",
        "debutTeam": lambda s, o: f"{clean_subject(s)} debuted with {o}",
        "leader": lambda s, o: f"The leader of {clean_subject(s)} is {o}",
        "deathPlace": lambda s, o: f"{clean_subject(s)} died in {o}",
        "isPartOf": lambda s, o: f"{clean_subject(s)} is part of {o}",
        "country": lambda s, o: f"{clean_subject(s)} is in {o}",
        "city": lambda s, o: f"{clean_subject(s)} is based in {o}",
        "ground": lambda s, o: f"The home ground of {clean_subject(s)} is {o}",
        "stadium": lambda s, o: f"The stadium of {clean_subject(s)} is {o}",
        "owner": lambda s, o: f"{clean_subject(s)} is owned by {o}",
        "generalManager": lambda s, o: f"The general manager of {clean_subject(s)} is {o}",
        "chairman": lambda s, o: f"The chairman of {clean_subject(s)} is {o}",
        "season": lambda s, o: f"{clean_subject(s)} participated in the {o} season",
        "currency": lambda s, o: f"The currency of {clean_subject(s)} is {o}",
        "demonym": lambda s, o: f"The demonym for {clean_subject(s)} is {o}",
        "officialLanguage": lambda s, o: f"The official language of {clean_subject(s)} is {o}",
        "language": lambda s, o: f"{o} is spoken in {clean_subject(s)}",
        "ethnicGroup": lambda s, o: f"{clean_subject(s)} includes the ethnic group {o}",
        "anthem": lambda s, o: f"{o} is the anthem of {clean_subject(s)}",
        "mostChampions": lambda s, o: f"The team with the most championships in {clean_subject(s)} is {o}",
        "leaderTitle": lambda s, o: f"The leader title of {clean_subject(s)} is {o}",
        "utcOffset": lambda s, o: f"The UTC offset for {clean_subject(s)} is {o}",
        "timeZone": lambda s, o: f"The time zone of {clean_subject(s)} is {o}",
        "areaTotal": lambda s, o: f"The total area of {clean_subject(s)} is {o}",
        "foundingDate": lambda s, o: f"{clean_subject(s)} was founded on {o}",
    }

    # Build a lookup of attributes for each subject
    subj_attrs = {}
    for t in triples:
        subj_attrs.setdefault(t.subject, {})[t.predicate] = t.object

    # Build sentences per subject, merging related facts into a single fluent clause.
    sentences = []
    for subject, attrs in subj_attrs.items():
        subj_clean = clean_subject(subject)
        fragments = []

        # Helper to join multiple items with commas and 'and'.
        def join_list(items):
            if not items:
                return ""
            if len(items) == 1:
                return items[0]
            return ", ".join(items[:-1]) + " and " + items[-1]

        # Combine club‑related predicates into one phrase.
        club_keys = ["club", "currentclub", "formerTeam", "draftTeam", "debutTeam"]
        clubs = [attrs[k] for k in club_keys if k in attrs]
        if clubs:
            if "currentclub" in attrs:
                fragments.append(f"currently plays for {join_list(clubs)}")
            elif "formerTeam" in attrs:
                fragments.append(f"formerly played for {join_list(clubs)}")
            else:
                fragments.append(f"plays for {join_list(clubs)}")

        # Simple one‑to‑one predicates.
        simple_map = {
            "birthDate": lambda o: f"was born on {o}",
            "birthYear": lambda o: f"was born in {o}",
            "birthPlace": lambda o: f"was born in {o}",
            "height": lambda o: f"is {o} meters tall",
            "weight": lambda o: f"weighs {o}",
            "position": lambda o: f"plays as a {o}",
            "league": lambda o: f"competes in the {o}",
            "manager": lambda o: f"is managed by {o}",
            "coach": lambda o: f"is coached by {o}",
            "draftYear": lambda o: f"was drafted in {o}",
            "draftRound": lambda o: f"was selected in round {o}",
            "draftPick": lambda o: f"was pick number {o.strip('\"')}",
            "playerNumber": lambda o: f"wears number {o}",
            "currentteam": lambda o: f"currently plays for {o}",
            "debutTeam": lambda o: f"debuted with {o}",
            "leader": lambda o: f"has leader {o}",
            "deathPlace": lambda o: f"died in {o}",
            "isPartOf": lambda o: f"is part of {o}",
            "country": lambda o: f"is in {o}",
            "city": lambda o: f"is based in {o}",
            "ground": lambda o: f"has home ground {o}",
            "stadium": lambda o: f"has stadium {o}",
            "owner": lambda o: f"is owned by {o}",
            "generalManager": lambda o: f"has general manager {o}",
            "chairman": lambda o: f"has chairman {o}",
            "season": lambda o: f"participated in the {o} season",
            "currency": lambda o: f"uses the {o} currency",
            "demonym": lambda o: f"has demonym {o}",
            "officialLanguage": lambda o: f"has official language {o}",
            "language": lambda o: f"speaks {o}",
            "ethnicGroup": lambda o: f"includes ethnic group {o}",
            "anthem": lambda o: f"has anthem {o}",
            "mostChampions": lambda o: f"has most championships by {o}",
            "leaderTitle": lambda o: f"has leader title {o}",
            "utcOffset": lambda o: f"has UTC offset {o}",
            "timeZone": lambda o: f"is in time zone {o}",
            "areaTotal": lambda o: f"covers an area of {o}",
            "foundingDate": lambda o: f"was founded on {o}",
        }

        for p, func in simple_map.items():
            if p in attrs:
                fragments.append(func(attrs[p]))

        if fragments:
            sentence = f"{subj_clean} " + ", ".join(fragments) + "."
            sentences.append(sentence)

    # Combine all subject sentences into final output.
    return " ".join(sentences)

# EVOLVE-BLOCK-END
